unavailable_text: 2004-07-08	ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO SEEK EMPLOYMENT ON JUL-08-2004 AS TO PETITIONER ROBERT DAVID WALKER NO APPEARANCE. ORDER OF ARREST ORDERED, CASHBAIL $1500.00 WITH A RESTRICTED RETURN TO ANY FRIDAY MORNING.
